label: pi-cleanup phase B — apply four missed status flips approved from the artifact-evidence audit (PI-001 styling design pass + PI-024/025/026 PI-022 backfill phases 2/3/4)

session.title: pi-cleanup phase B — apply four missed status flips identified by artifact-evidence audit (PI-001, PI-024, PI-025, PI-026)
session.conversation_reference: Claude Code session at Doug's terminal on 2026-05-25, opened against PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-pi-cleanup-A-review-open-items.md. Phase A produced the artifact-evidence audit at PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/pi-cleanup/PI-CLEANUP-PROPOSAL.md (commits 80ad3fa then 6f4076c after methodology correction); Doug approved 'go ahead and apply all' RESOLVE recommendations; phase B authored this payload and applied it.
session.topics_covered: Re-ran the pi-cleanup audit after Doug correctly flagged that the first version's keyword-scan against PI descriptions was structurally wrong: PI descriptions are immutable scope statements written at PI-creation time, not status fields, so they never get updated when work lands. The corrected method extracts the concrete artifacts each PI's description specifies (ORM models, alembic migrations, vocab entries, methodology document sections, snapshot record counts, file existence) and checks them against current codebase / snapshot state. Five parallel general-purpose subagents verified 36 of the 37 Open PIs across V2 schema/access/API, V1 deploy engine, methodology + governance content, V2 desktop UI panels, and governance backfill + deployment + auth scopes; the 37th (PI-001) was verified inline. Revised tally: 4 RESOLVE / 6 NEEDS-INPUT / 27 KEEP. Four RESOLVEs were missed-flip cases — substantive work landed in prior workstreams but no resolves edge was authored and no status update happened. PI-001 (full styling design pass per DEC-024): six v0.6 build slices A-F shipped across SES-037..SES-043 on 2026-05-18; status v16 payload narrates 'PI-001 is discharged' verbatim but the planning_item record was never flipped. PI-024 (PI-022 phase 2 — backfill prior workstreams): workstreams.json has 9 records covering the 7 prior workstreams the description lists, plus WS-001 (the v0.7 release itself) and WS-009 (Code Change Lifecycle); apply commit 7eec15d2 landed the records before the PI-022 umbrella closed. PI-025 (phase 3 — backfill prior conversations): conversations.json has 46 CONV records, all status 'complete', matching the orchestrator's target (37 + 8 Phase 1 + CONV-046 ad-hoc) after DEC-197 descoped 16 orphan sessions; apply commit af11e649 landed them. PI-026 (phase 4 — backfill historical applies as deposit_events): deposit_events.json has 32 historical-tagged records (DEP-001..008 from Phase 1 + DEP-020..043 from Phase 4), matching the DEC-210 24-payload scope tightening exactly; apply commit 944495e1 landed them with matching dep_NNN-historical.log placeholders. The PI-022 umbrella close commit b34391ff incorrectly characterized 'Phase 2 deferred' even though the backfill scripts had been applied days prior — a documented integrity drift this cleanup repairs. The six NEEDS-INPUT items (PI-023, PI-027, PI-028, PI-029, PI-032, PI-047) were deliberately not resolved in this pass: each requires a judgment call (stay-Open contracts for PI-027 / PI-028 pending PI-033 backfill; the missing StorageClient methods on PI-029; the unmet root CLAUDE.md cross-reference on PI-032; the file-vs-DB divergence on PI-047; the design redesign on PI-023). The 27 KEEPs all verified as positively not done — concrete artifact missing in each case (no ORM column, no vocab entry, no methodology section, no UI panel, no migration). Pattern surfaced by the corrected audit: the PI-022 backfill program's individual phases finished before the umbrella closed, so the umbrella-level close commit lost track of its own children's state. Same shape as PI-001: substantive work ships, governance bookkeeping misses the final flip.
session.artifacts_produced: PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/pi-cleanup/PI-CLEANUP-PROPOSAL.md (commits 80ad3fa keyword-scan version then 6f4076c artifact-evidence revision). PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/close-out-payloads/ses_076.json (this payload). PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/deposit-event-logs/dep_056.log (apply transcript, written by apply_close_out.py).
